assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains the detected claim text (e.g., 'PR reviews cannot be updated' or 'does not support modifying a submitted review')
assertion_results.evidence: File contains both: 'PR reviews cannot be updated after initial submission so always create a new review' (line 7) and 'The GitHub API does not support modifying a submitted review' (line 8)

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains a reference to the GitHub REST API endpoint PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} or equivalent evidence that the claim is incorrect
assertion_results.evidence: File contains 'PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}' on line 21 and states 'The claim is **incorrect**. The GitHub REST API does support updating a submitted pull request review.' on line 14

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains suggested corrected language for the Requirement
assertion_results.evidence: File contains '## Suggested Corrected Language' section (line 28) with corrected requirement: 'Update existing PR review when re-running evals on the same PR, or create a new review if none exists' (line 33) and corrected notes (line 34)
